name: CP-122721
description: CP-122721, neurokinin 1 (NK1) antagonist is developed by Pfizer to treat depression, emesis, and inflammatory diseases including asthma and irritable bowel syndrome.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in asthma, depression, and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
mechanismOfAction: CP-122721 interacts with high affinity at the human NK1 receptor expressed in IM-9 cells.
